top_signals.title: Crude Oil Shipments Through Hormuz at Reach Highest Level Since Start of War
top_signals.summary: Crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz rose this week to their highest level since the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran began in February after a ceasefire deal reopened the waterway, data showed on Thursday.Concerns about how long the strait would stay open also boosted trade.Still…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Renewed Tech Selloff Jolts Asian Stocks, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks slumped to a two-week low as the tech sector came under renewed pressure after a selloff in Apple Inc.’s shares and a report that OpenAI may delay its initial public offering soured sentiment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: GSMA Ltd. CEO Hoffman on Mobile Technology
top_signals.summary: John Hoffman, the CEO of GSMA, says China is well positioned to shape the next era of communications, particularly in the field of agentic AI. He speaks on the sidelines of Mobile World Congress in Shanghai. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: French Navy Seizes Tanker Linked to Russian Shadow Fleet
top_signals.summary: France's navy seized another tanker it said was linked to Russia's "shadow fleet" on Thursday, underscoring the escalation this year in European efforts to enforce sanctions and squeeze one of Moscow’s main revenue streams.Nine suspected shadow fleet tankers…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: FedEx Freight forecasts growth as standalone company
top_signals.summary:
FedEx Freight expects profit margin to grow by more than 9% in the back half of the year, up more than a point from last year’s growth.

The post FedEx Freight forecasts growth as standalone company appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: New macOS malware embeds fake errors to confuse AI analysis tools
top_signals.summary: A newly discovered macOS malware dubbed "Gaslight" is designed to confuse AI-assisted malware analysis tools by hiding prompt injection strings and fake debugging data within the executable. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Drone Startup Elroy Air Is Said to Near $800 Million SPAC Deal
top_signals.summary: Elroy Air Inc., a cargo drone startup aiming to replace delivery trucks, is in advanced talks to go public through a merger with a blank-check vehicle that will create a company with an enterprise value of about $1 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The world’s top-performing stock market still isn’t a developed market. Here’s why, according to the MSCI chief
top_signals.summary: MSCI CEO Henry Fernandez said South Korea's stock market still falls short of developed market standards.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nelly Korda maintains competitive mindset while pursuing rare heights
top_signals.summary: Twenty-seven points must be accumulated to earn a spot in the LGPA Hall of ​Fame, and Korda is two points shy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ikoyi founder Jeremy Chan: ‘Eating my own food is forbidden’
top_signals.summary: Jeremy Chan is a singular guy. Upon arrival for the only sitting at Ikoyi, he greets each guest at the door, ushering them into a space that feels less a dining room than a glimpse into his subconscious. Quiet and intense, he thinks about food in a way I’ve never heard expressed before. Eating his [...]

top_signals.title: American Ocean Minerals finishes first offshore exploration mission in Cook Islands
top_signals.summary: AOMC has a definitive merger agreement with Odyssey Marine Exploration, in a deal expected to create a US-controlled deep-sea critical minerals company valued at $1 billion.
